expectations.text: Output starts with '# 審查：denomination-claims.md' or similar header
expectations.evidence: Header is '# Review: denomination-claims.md' — English, no '審查' format.
Uses free-form categories (Divine Name, Factual Errors, Verse Reference, etc.) — 10 sections but not the 10-check structure.

expectations.text: At least one check is marked N/A or 此檢查不適用 when inapplicable
expectations.evidence: No N/A markers. Uses free-form structure without numbered checks.

expectations.text: Output ends with a summary table
expectations.evidence: Has '## Summary of Issues Found' with | Category | Count | table.

expectations.text: Report does NOT auto-fix any content
expectations.evidence: Ends with 'Priority Recommendations (Do Not Auto-Fix)' — explicitly report-only.

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline found more raw issues (33+) but lacked the structured 10-check format.
